item.description:
# MacDriveSnap 26.7.3
MacDriveSnap 26.7.3 focuses on more reliable catalogue-managed imports, better HTML report previews, and layout polish in the snapshot browser.
## Improvements
- Imported snap files are now copied into the catalogue's managed Reports folder, so catalogue entries no longer depend on the original import location. - HTML reports now include a static folder tree and file list fallback so Quick Look can preview snapshot contents even when JavaScript is unavailable. - Quick Look previews now show folder and file icons in the static sidebar and main file list. - Snapshot browser header metadata now stays on a single line and truncates cleanly in smaller windows. - Reduced the gap between the drive summary and metadata in the snapshot browser header.
## Fixes
- Fixed generated report JavaScript initialization for the resizable sidebar.
